MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF IVETTE POOL's Motion To Dismiss Class Claims Without Prejudice.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Ivette Pool's motion to dismiss class claims without prejudice, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. The class claims, as contained in the First through Ninth Causes of Action of the First Amended Complaint, filed January 4, 2023, are ordered dismissed without prejudice.

Order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
